rationale: The cited paper appears in a single grouped citation in the literature review as one example of prior CRM work linking marketing and customer behavior. The citing paper does not discuss Fader et al. (2005) separately, does not use its RFM/CLV framework or iso-value methodology, and does not build hypotheses or interpretation specifically from it. The study's core modeling choices are anchored in habit-based measures and other sources, so this citation functions as background context only.
